events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: residential job, piping & plumbing, spool erection & fit-up, rough-complete. Field condition: flange bolt-hole rotation wrong (two-holing missed). Reference ASME B31.3, iso drawings. Need decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Flange bolt-hole rotation wrong can cause misalignment, leakage, stress. In piping, two-holing is required for proper alignment and gasket compression. ASME B31.3 requires flanges aligned per design; bolt holes straddle centerlines. So fail. Risk maybe high because potential leak under pressure, but residential maybe medium/high. Let's choose high. Work_stage rough-complete. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete scenario says treat as roughly 70 percent complete until defects corrected. So percent_complete 70. value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. workable empty list. findings: flange bolt holes not oriented per project iso / two-holing missed; misalignment may cause gasket crush/leak; non-compliant with ASME B31.3. actions: loosen flange, rotate to correct bolt-hole orientation per iso drawing, re-torque in proper sequence, re-inspect. rationale. references: ASME B31.3, project isometric drawings. Need ensure JSON valid.
